message:
feat(moe): stable VIP expert pinning with safety locks (19s/token)

Implements Strategy #4 from unlimit.md: Hot/Cold Expert Partitioning

Key changes:
- ResidentExpertCache: heap-resident buffers via newBufferWithBytes (fixes mmap page faults)
- VIP Pinning: experts 0 & 4 are never evicted (~84% of routing decisions)
- Safety Locks: per-batch generation counter prevents GPU race condition crashes
- LRU eviction with grace period for non-VIP experts

Performance:
- Before: 200+ seconds/token (mmap page fault thrashing)
- After: 19 seconds/token (10x improvement)
- VIP hit rate: 84%
- Prefill: 142s (down from 290s)

Memory budget: 50% of system RAM (8GB on 16GB Mac)
- ~5.2GB for VIP experts (2 experts × 32 layers × 3 tensors)
- ~2.8GB for LRU rotation of non-VIP experts

Next: Strategy #1 (Speculative Expert Prefetching) to hide remaining SSD latency
